tolerance.rationale: Frontend BS uses Abramowitz & Stegun 7.1.26 normal-CDF approximation (|error| < 1.5e-7). For typical S~100 options this propagates to up to ~1.5e-5 in BS price units. atol=1e-4 is comfortably above that error floor. Tightening would require a higher-precision TS CDF — out of scope for the parity test.
